zh.lifeSummary: 當William Roddam 2nd於大約1260年出生在英國諾圖波藍德洛達姆時，他的父親William Rodham 1st18歲，母親Mrs. William Rodham16歲。他和Lady Maud Stanhope至少有6個兒子。他去世於1355年在英國英格蘭享年96歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Roddam 2nd于大约1260年出生在英国諾圖波藍德洛達姆时，他的父亲William Rodham 1st18岁，母亲Mrs. William Rodham16岁。他和Lady Maud Stanhope至少有6个儿子。他去世于1355年在英国英格兰享年96岁。

nameMeanings.name: Roddam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham and Northumberland): habitational name from Roddam in Ilderton (Northumberland). The placename means ‘at the clearings’, from Old English rodum, dative plural form of rod, rodu ‘clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Roddam 2nd was born about 1260, in Roddam, Northumberland, England, his father, William Rodham 1st, was 18 and his mother, Mrs. William Rodham, was 16. He had at least 6 sons with Lady Maud Stanhope. He died in 1355, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Roddam 2nd est né environ 1260, à Roddam, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Rodham 1st, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William Rodham, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Lady Maud Stanhope. Il est décédé en 1355, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 96 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Roddam 2nd um 1260 in Roddam, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Rodham 1st 18 und seine Mutter Mrs. William Rodham 16. Er hatte mit Lady Maud Stanhope mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1355 im Alter von 96 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Roddam 2nd è nato il circa 1260 nel Roddam, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, William Rodham 1st, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. William Rodham, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Lady Maud Stanhope. Morì nel 1355, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 96 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Roddam 2ndが約1260年にイギリスノースウンバーランドロッドアムで生まれた時，父William Rodham 1stは18歳，母Mrs. William Rodhamは16歳であった。彼はLady Maud Stanhopeとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1355年にイギリスイギリスで96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Roddam 2nd(이)가 대략 1260년 영국 노르스벌랜드 로다에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Rodham 1st(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William Rodham(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Lady Maud Stanhope(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1355년 영국 잉글랜드에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Roddam 2nd nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Roddam, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Rodham 1st, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William Rodham, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Lady Maud Stanhope. Ele faleceu em 1355, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Roddam 2nd родился около 1260 г. в местности роддам, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William Rodham 1st было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William Rodham, 16. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Lady Maud Stanhope. Он умер в 1355 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 96 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Roddam 2nd nació aproximadamente 1260, en Roddam, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William Rodham 1st, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mrs. William Rodham, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Lady Maud Stanhope. Murió en 1355, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 96 años.
